programmes.show_description: Programmes Start at 07:00.
The Jaguar: Out in the Amazon rainforest, Tiny Toot, Gato and Pixie meet a beautiful jaguar girl. She is limping a bit because she has a splinter in one of her paws.
Elephant Wash: Elephant mum is washing her baby with mud from her trunk. When Elephant dad lifts Tiny Toot up with his trunk, she can scrub behind the baby's ears with a palm leaf.
Frankie and Cecil are scared of the scary things.
Flat Pack: As Mum and Dad struggle to put together their new flat-pack swing seat, Bluey and Bingo play a game and use the cardboard and bubble wrap to construct their own mini-civilisation.
Dylan the Firefighter wants to put out fires and do a big rescue, but when all the firefighters get stuck, who will rescue them?
Dylan the Pizza Delivery Pup wants to deliver a delicious pizza fast - but every shortcut is another adventure.
At school, Daniel gets so mad at Miss Elaina that he wants to push her. Instead, he remembers the importance of self-control and how to stop himself from hurting a friend.
The Heavy Metal Band is searching for a new sound, much to Helium's annoyance. But little do they know she might have exactly what they need.
Deed encourages a friend to say 'plane' and we go on a whirlwind word adventure.
The four adventure-seeking superheroes must try to stop a Giant Grandmaster Glitch from making trouble at the Giant's Causeway.
Everyone wants to win Swoppiton's hide-and-seek tournament. But Mojo and Bo accidentally break the prize. They need to put it back together without the seeker spotting them!
Astro-Heroes to the Rescue: The Astro Heroes are feeling down after a failure, leaving Attic Town in a gloomy mood. Ollie comes up with a fake mission to lift their spirits.
Dinosaur Extinction: Teeny Rex is fed up with being ignored by Bella, so he disappears to get noticed! Cephy covers for him.

programmes.show_name: Lex and Plu Space Taxi Drivers
programmes.show_description: The Lucky Ball: Fur Taxi's latest gig: this time Lex and Plu need to deliver the dog Seva to a ping-pong tournament.
The Diary Badge: The Squirrels discover Duggee's old diary and are keen to write their own.
The Metal Detector Badge: Roly needs to use the bathroom, but the door is locked and Duggee has mislaid the key.
After changing the rules of their Traffic Light game, Sonia, Hugo and their friends discover that they're now playing something else, and just as fun! (SL)
Hugo and Sonia aren't sure about trying the smelly cauliflower, until they learn that things don't always taste how they smell. (SL)
Joe meets Jack and his Dad at the mechanics who are fixing up a classic car for the Classic Car Parade, but need Joe's deliveries to finish the job! (SL)
The Jaguar: Out in the Amazon rainforest, Tiny Toot, Gato and Pixie meet a beautiful jaguar girl. She is limping a bit because she has a splinter in one of her paws.
Elephant Wash: Elephant mum is washing her baby with mud from her trunk. When Elephant dad lifts Tiny Toot up with his trunk, she can scrub behind the baby's ears with a palm leaf.
Frankie and Cecil are scared of the scary things.
Zips Movie: The friends are making their own movies. But when Zip struggles to think of an idea, can he make his film in time for the big movie night?
Henry meets a golf ball on a crazy golf course, Golf ball has always lived on the crazy golf course but he desperately wants to become a golf pro!
Den: Seamus and Little Woo are spotting wildlife in the woods, so Stanley builds them a special camouflaged den so they can watch quietly and not scare the creatures.
Flower: Fifi's sunbell flower needs protecting so it can grow.
Pre-school animation about a young girl whose enthusiasm infects everyone around her.
Mionmhisean: Nuair a laghdaítear Adam agus an criú go méid micreascópach, caithfidh siad síob a fháil ar dhroim Bubby chun an micreascóp a bhaint amach sula scuabann Shelby amach sa spás iad.
Beag ach Láidir: Nuair a fhaigheann an criú glao éigeandála, ag iarraidh orthu muintir MegBzz a shábháil óna bpláinéad atá ag fáil bháis, tá an chuma air go mbeidh sé dodhéanta.
Brewster & Maggie wonder 'Why do our heads hurt after we drink cold stuff too fast?
Brewster and Maggie are at Ginger's play but she can't focus because her tummy rumbles. She wonders why, so she visits Bob O'Tummy.
Tugann Peppa cúnamh do Danny Dog a sheomra a dhéanamh suas agus piocann siad an téama foghlaithe agus ollphéisteanna mara.
Tá Peppa agus a cairde ag an nGrúpa Spraoi le Madame Gazelle. Tá na páistí ag foghlaim faoin aimsir agus déanann siad stáisiún aimsire.
The Óg Olympics have come to Tír na nÓg and everyone is taking part in them. The Olympic torch is brought to each sporting event.
Léim na mbradán: Ba mhaith le Otto léim na mbradán a fheiceáil i gcuideachta Oona ach beidh air Pip agus Pop a chur ina luí ar tús.
An Faoileán Mór: Téann Oona agus na faoileán i bpáirt le chéile le dul i gcoinne namhaid coiteann.
Gulliver has trouble looking after Diva's plant whilst she is away.
Share to Care: Kenny is searching for purple popping fruits. After managing to gather the fruit, he plans to enjoy them on a hill with a view of the sunset. Instead, he finds Reggie crying.
The presenter looks at the Iberomesornis - a bird that lived in the forests of Spain approximately 127 million years ago.
Everyone wants to win Swoppiton's hide-and-seek tournament. But Mojo and Bo accidentally break the prize. They need to put it back together without the seeker spotting them!

Tugann Peppa agus George cuairt ar Granny agus Grandpa. Tá Grandpa Pig ag déanamh Gairdín Cloch. Tugann na páistí cúnamh do Grandpa.
Tá na tuismitheoirí ag glanadh. Tugann siad aon rud nach bhfuil ag teastáil uathu chuig an siopa carthanais chun go mbeidh siad ag daoine eile.

programmes.show_name: Thomas and Friends: All Engines Go
programmes.show_description: Postage Percy: Percy is tasked with finding the perfect image to put on a new Sodor stamp.
YODEL: While out hillwalking with Mum, Maddie + Triggs meet a new friend who teaches them all about yodelling - an ancient method of communicating over long distances.

programmes.show_description: Heart: Experimenters Eilidh and Travis visit Nina in the lab to see what hearts look like and feel its beat.
Mission: Hobby Fair: Charli and her disability assistance dog Tinks visit a Hobby Fair at Woofton Town Hall, where Charli is selling all the clever things she makes.
Amhrán Na gCairde: Tá MeMo agus BaBa ag rá amhráin. Cluineann siad na hÉiníní agus déanann siad iarracht aithris a dhéanamh orthu.
Programmes Start at 07:00.
Programmes Start at 07:00.
Hedgie Sledding: Now used to the snow, Pins and Nettie looking for stuff to do in it.
It's Time for a Roller Disco: JoJo is learning to roller skate in the garden with Gran Gran - but there's not enough room. It's time for a Gran Gran plan - they're off to the roller disco!
It's Time to Make a New Game: JoJo and Raya are playing snakes and ladders.
Runner Bean: Live from the Roots and Fruits Theatre, it's the speedy dancing runner beans, who won't stand still for even one minute.
Strawberry: Live from the Roots and Fruits Theatre, it's Strawberry, who used to be insecure, but now can't wait to celebrate herself and sing her song, See the Seeds!
Fun and games with the animals of the forest.
Isabelle and Oona are getting distracted as they meet their friends.
When Bernie gets washed out to sea on a bit of driftwood waiting on Bernadette for a date, Oona goes in search of Marvin to help.
When a UFO crash-lands near her campsite, Doodle Girl decides to give two nervous alien tourists a tour of her beloved sketchbook.
The Perfect Present: Pockets, Giggle and Spin make a present for Roller Guinea, but when he doesn't like the gift they try to find another way to make him happy.
Prickly's Ice-Skating Uh-Oh: Prickly insists he 'doesn't like' ice skating. Vida gives him vet care AND sage advice.
Sunny's Noise No-No: Sunny suddenly refuses to see the Sweetwood Band. Vida discovers he needs earmuffs for the show!
Mel's Fancy Shawl Dancer: Mel is trying to create the perfect art project to honor her grandmother on Orange Shirt Day.
Camp Out: When Moose is too scared to sleep out in the woods with the rest of the troupe, the Crew use materials they find in nature to build a doghouse.
When Joe, Peter and Mike go up the mountain without their coats, a sunny day turns bad fast, and Mike gets injured.
While on an archaeological dig, Norman and Peter get trapped on a cliff ledge while trying to find the King of Pontypandy's crown.
Set in the Dizzy Deliveries Depot with Joe, Aisling and Ozzy the robot. Pre-school and Lamh Users of all ages learn 3 key Lamh signs in every episode. (SL)
Set in the Dizzy Deliveries Depot with Joe, Aisling and Ozzy the robot. Pre-school and Lamh Users of all ages learn 3 key Lamh signs in every episode. (SL)

programmes.show_name: Thomas and Friends: All Engines Go
programmes.show_description: Night Lights: There is a big announcement for James - in preparation for his important night-time shipment to McColl's Farm, he will receive a new headlamp!

programmes.show_name: Thomas and Friends: All Engines Go
programmes.show_description: For love or Muddy: It is a very soggy day on Sodor - sticky and stinky mud puddles of all shapes and sizes have overwhelmed the island!
Andy And The Shoebill Chick: Andy heads to Southern Africa to discover how shoebill chicks drink water.
While playing dress-up, Punky and Niamh decide to put on a play for Mom, Con and Cranky. One by one, the family members get dragged into the play
Bíonn an-spraoi ag Sonia in éineacht le na cara nua, Cloichín, ag an trá.
Téann Sonia agus Hugo amú ar oideas, ach cruthaíonn siad oideas blasta nua!
Lily and Wee Rabbit hear a strange noise at Wild Rocks. Could it be a monster?
Salty and Lily find a piece of cloth while out at sea, and Lily imagines that it could be from a carnival on Driftwood Bay.
Pre-animation series following a little girl called Mya, who has a lot of infectious enthusiasm a fearless sense of adventure.
It's another sunny day in the town of Everyday and Ms. Teach's classroom are picking their class captain. Mya Go and Tommy Stop are both in the running for the badge of honour.
Lá breá gréine i mBaile Gach An Lá . . .agus tá Ruby Déan tar éis cuireadh a thabhairt do Mya Go, Tommy Stad agus Daire Gáire go dtí a cóisir lá breithe d'eolaithe óga.
The siblings find a very hot and thirsty dog lost on the beach. Animation about the adventures of two sisters.
When Mr Flurry gets trapped in his mobile by the snow, Nelly & Nora help get him out.
It's a VERY hot day and Kiva, Saul and Angus must find a clever way too keep cool.
Mr Robin shows the Wee Littles the way to a blackberry patch, but the path there is blocked by a high stonewall. How are they going to get to the blackberries now?
Hedgie Sledding: Now used to the snow, Pins and Nettie looking for stuff to do in it.
Henry meets an Easter egg.
Mel's Fancy Shawl Dancer: Mel is trying to create the perfect art project to honor her grandmother on Orange Shirt Day.
Camp Out: When Moose is too scared to sleep out in the woods with the rest of the troupe, the Crew use materials they find in nature to build a doghouse.

programmes.show_name: Boy Girl Dog Cat Mouse Cheese
programmes.show_description: The kids visit an eco camp to learn how to grow vegetables. Unfortunately, the Smith twins are also there and have no intention of pulling their weight.
On her first day in Backwoods, Ranger Rooney makes a new friend in know-it-all Hare, but finds the other animals much less welcoming.
